data.content: Implementation review rejected. Acceptance is still unmet for two reasons. First, the required Playwright verification is not usable: tests/e2e/beat-refresh-latency.spec.ts times out at the initial networkidle wait in all three cases, so it never proves <1s refresh, and its update flow points at selectors that do not exist in the current UI. Second, non-user-initiated events still refetch the active beat list immediately: src/lib/session-connection-manager.ts calls invalidateBeatListQueries() on successful background session completion, and src/lib/beat-query-cache.ts uses refetchType='active', which conflicts with the requirement that background events keep the normal 10-second polling cadence. Branch sanity checks that did pass during review: targeted lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
